title: OpenBag Skill Manifest
description: JSON Schema for SKILL.yaml manifests. Aligns with OpenClaw AgentSkills manifest format adapted for OpenBag. Validate with: openbag skill validate

name.description: Unique skill identifier. Must start with 'skill-', lowercase, hyphen-separated.

license.description: SPDX identifier. OpenBag Foundation policy: open-source only.

description.description: Plain-text description of what the skill does. 1-3 sentences. Shown in ClawHub-BR listing.

category.description: Primary category: core (Foundation-maintained, pre-installed), community (ClawHub-BR), or experimental.

maturity.description: Maturity level. 'stable' required for core skills.

permissions.description: Capabilities the skill needs. User approves each at install. Principle of least privilege enforced by Gateway.

oneOf.description: Read-only access to worker agent data
HTTP access to specific domain+path (e.g. http:sebrae.com.br/api/mei/*)
Access to encrypted local SQLCipher store
Local IPC call to another installed skill

dependencies.description: Version constraints on runtime and peer skills.

skills.description: Required peer skills and their minimum versions.

hooks.description: Lifecycle hook entry points (relative paths from skill root).

on_first_run.description: Runs on first agent boot after install.

on_wake.description: Runs each time the agent wakes (periodic heartbeat).

on_verify.description: Runs when a citizen triggers a verification event.

on_panic.description: Runs when panic mode is activated (core-sensitive only).

on_route_start.description: Runs when worker starts a delivery route.

on_route_end.description: Runs when worker ends a delivery route.

on_tier_change.description: Runs when worker's reputation tier changes.

ui.description: User interface integration with the OpenBag Agent shell.

entry_point.description: Relative path to UI entry (React Native component or Flutter widget).

icon.description: Relative path to icon (SVG preferred, 256×256 PNG fallback).

i18n.description: Localised display strings. Keys are BCP-47 language tags. Default pt-BR.

docs.description: URL to full documentation (required for community skills).

audit_url.description: URL to public security audit. Required for core and core-sensitive skills.

display_name.description: Human-readable name (max 60 chars). Shown in app UI. Falls back to name if absent.

experimental.description: Show experimental warning to user at install time.
